task_completion.description: Verify that the required custom fields are created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Snipe-IT 'Custom Fields' page showing 'Network MAC Address' (format: MAC) and 'Mobile OS Version' (format: Alpha Numeric) in the list of fields.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'BYOD Device Info' fieldset is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Snipe-IT 'Fieldsets' page showing 'BYOD Device Info'. Ideally, it should show that it contains the two custom fields created earlier.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'BYOD - Approved' status label is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Snipe-IT 'Status Labels' page showing 'BYOD - Approved' with the type set to 'Deployable'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Personal Smartphone' asset model is created with the correct attributes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Snipe-IT 'Asset Models' page showing 'Personal Smartphone'. It should be associated with the 'Generic' manufacturer, 'Mobile Devices' category, and the 'BYOD Device Info' fieldset.

task_completion.description: Verify that asset 'BYOD-001' is registered and checked out to 'jsmith' with correct details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'All Assets' list or the specific asset view for 'BYOD-001'. It must show status 'BYOD - Approved', assigned to 'jsmith', MAC '00:1A:2B:3C:4D:5E', OS 'iOS 17.2', and a purchase cost of $0.00.

task_completion.description: Verify that asset 'BYOD-002' is registered and checked out to 'mjones' with correct details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'All Assets' list or the specific asset view for 'BYOD-002'. It must show status 'BYOD - Approved', assigned to 'mjones', MAC 'AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF', OS 'Android 14', and a purchase cost of $0.00.

task_completion.description: Verify that asset 'BYOD-003' is registered and checked out to 'tlee' with correct details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'All Assets' list or the specific asset view for 'BYOD-003'. It must show status 'BYOD - Approved', assigned to 'tlee', MAC '11:22:33:44:55:66', OS 'iOS 16.5', and a purchase cost of $0.00.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Snipe-IT web interface to perform the configurations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent is navigating the Snipe-IT web application in a browser, rather than using curl commands or API scripts in a terminal.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not directly manipulate the database to insert the records.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that there are no terminal windows open showing MySQL/MariaDB queries inserting the custom fields, models, or assets directly into the database.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually filled out the forms for the assets and models.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the agent actively typing or selecting dropdowns in the Snipe-IT creation forms (e.g., 'Create Asset', 'Create Asset Model').

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified requirements: 1. Custom Fields: 'Network MAC Address' (MAC format) and 'Mobile OS Version' (Alpha Numeric). 2. Fieldset: 'BYOD Device Info'. 3. Status Label: 'BYOD - Approved' (Deployable). 4. Asset Model: 'Personal Smartphone' (Manufacturer: Generic, Category: Mobile Devices, Fieldset: BYOD Device Info). 5. Assets (Cost $0.00, Status 'BYOD - Approved'): BYOD-001 assigned to 'jsmith' (MAC: 00:1A:2B:3C:4D:5E, OS: iOS 17.2); BYOD-002 assigned to 'mjones' (MAC: AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF, OS: Android 14); BYOD-003 assigned to 'tlee' (MAC: 11:22:33:44:55:66, OS: iOS 16.5).
